subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the peerless Beloved, Who hath from time immemorial and unto everlasting been sanctified above the description of all created things and the attributes of all existing beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب بیزوالی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل و لایزال از وصف ممکنات و نعت موجودات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
